final:
module RefModule (  
    input wire J,  
    input wire K,  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire reset,  
    input wire preset,  
    output reg Q  
);  
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge preset) begin  
        if (reset)  
            Q <= 0;  
        else if (preset)  
            Q <= 1;  
        else begin  
            case ({J, K})  
                2'b00: Q <= Q; // No change  
                2'b01: Q <= 0; // Reset  
                2'b10: Q <= 1; // Set  
                2'b11: Q <= ~Q; // Toggle  
            endcase  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
